pageContext.name: The Creature
pageContext.description: Hammer Films reinvented the classic monsters more than once. Star Ace presents their version of Frankenstein's monster from the 1970s.   This 12.59' tall sixth-scale figure is fully articulated and features a portrait of Dave Prowse as the Creature. His costume is styled after the original look and he comes with a severed head in a jar, a bloody ax, a neck chain, lab equipment, multiple hands, and a cloth drape.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your horror collection today!
